Hourly: $35-$95 - Expert - Est. Time: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week
We’re replacing New Relic and need a simple monitoring setup. Stack: GCP VM Redis CloudSQL (MySQL) Laravel (Octane) Browser performance What we need: System metrics (CPU, memory, disk) Redis + MySQL monitoring Laravel errors + slow requests Browser performance + JS errors Alerts via PagerDuty integration Requirements: GCP monitoring experience Laravel performance experience Examples of similar work Scope: Set up, configure, and document so we can manage it.

Hourly: $40-$70 - Expert - Est. Time: More than 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week
We are seeking a skilled Database Administrator (DBA) to proactively monitor our SQL servers and ensure their optimal performance. The ideal candidate will troubleshoot and fix issues as they arise while collaborating closely with our engineering and IT teams to resolve problems efficiently. If you are experienced in database management and enjoy working in a team environment, we want to hear from you!

Senior Software Engineer

  • Just not interested
  • Vague Description
  • Unrealistic Expectations
  • Too Many Applicants
  • Job posted too long ago
  • Poor reviews about the client
  • Doesn't Match Skills
  • I am overqualified
  • Budget too low
  • Not in my preferred location
  • The client will not be notified. Your feedback helps us improve job search.
Hourly: $70-$85 - Expert - Est. Time: 3 to 6 months, 30+ hrs/week
Only freelancers located in the United States may apply.
**Senior Full-Stack Developer — Hardware-Integrated Simulation Platform** **Overview** We're building a next-generation motion-based training and simulation platform that integrates custom motion hardware, real-time control systems, and cloud-based data services. We're looking for a highly capable Senior Developer to help design, build, and scale the core systems that power our product. This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of real-time systems, hardware integration, and modern cloud architecture — and wants to work on a product that blends physical and digital experiences. **Scope of Work** *Full-Stack System Development* - Design and implement features across our Control Center (system control UI), Calibration App (precision setup and tuning), and host service / orchestration layer - Build reliable backend services supporting real-time platform behavior - Contribute to frontend applications where UX ties directly to hardware control *Hardware & Firmware Integration* - Interface with firmware and embedded systems controlling platform motion - Translate sensor data (position, displacement, motion vectors) into usable software inputs - Improve control loops and responsiveness between hardware and software - Collaborate with hardware engineers to debug and optimize system behavior *Data & Modeling* - Work with motion and sensor datasets to generate smooth curves, implement interpolation and modeling logic, and support calibration and tuning workflows - Contribute to data pipelines used for reporting and analytics - Help refine the mathematical models driving platform behavior *Cloud & Backend Development* - Build and maintain services deployed in Azure (UAT & Production) - Develop APIs for internal applications and third-party integrations - Support data ingestion, storage, and reporting systems - Ensure performance, scalability, and reliability of backend systems *Integrations* - Implement and maintain integrations with third-party measurement systems and biomechanics tools - Normalize and map external data into our internal data model - Troubleshoot and improve integration reliability *Testing & Debugging* - Debug across the full stack: firmware ↔ software ↔ cloud - Develop tools for calibration validation, system diagnostics, and data verification - Participate in real-world testing with physical hardware **Required Qualifications** - 5+ years of software development experience - Strong proficiency in one or more of: Python, C#, C++, or JavaScript/TypeScript - Experience with backend systems and API development - Experience working with real-world data (sensor, telemetry, or time-series) - Ability to debug complex, cross-system issues **Preferred Qualifications** - Hardware integration or embedded systems experience - Real-time or low-latency systems experience - Azure or similar cloud platform experience - Familiarity with signal processing, interpolation, or curve fitting - Background in motion systems, control systems, simulation, robotics, or IoT **What Makes This Engagement Unique** - You'll work on a system where code directly affects physical movement - High-visibility impact across product performance and user experience - Opportunity to shape both real-time control systems and cloud infrastructure - Hands-on work with cutting-edge hardware simulation technology **Success Metrics** - Reliable, performant implementation of core platform features - Improved accuracy and smoothness of motion models - Stability of integrations with external systems - Speed and quality of debugging across hardware/software boundaries - Contribution to scalable, maintainable architecture **Engagement Details** - Long-term engagement preferred - Remote-friendly with flexible hours - Please share relevant examples of hardware-integrated or real-time systems work in your proposal **Suggested skill tags for Upwork:** Python, C#, TypeScript, Azure, API Development, Embedded Systems, IoT, Real-Time Systems, Signal Processing, Hardware Integration, Full-Stack Development
